q: What was your favorite subject in primary school?
examiner_note:
Giám khảo muốn nghe bạn kể về sở thích thuở nhỏ. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Chọn một môn học (Toán, Tiếng Việt, Vẽ, Nhạc, Thể dục). Giải thích lý do (do môn đó vui, do bạn học giỏi, hay do thầy cô giáo). 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'Back in my primary school days', 'I had a soft spot for', 'The reason why it appealed to me was...', 'It came naturally to me'.

band7.text: My favorite subject in primary school was Art. I loved drawing and painting different things, like animals and landscapes. It was the only subject where I could be creative and express my feelings without any stress.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, giải thích lý do đơn giản và rõ ràng. Sử dụng từ vựng ổn ('Art', 'creative').

band8.text: As far as I can recall, I had a soft spot for Mathematics. Even at a young age, I was fascinated by numbers and logic. What really appealed to me was the fact that there was always a clear and precise answer to every problem.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ hay như 'soft spot for', 'fascinated by', 'appealed to me', 'precise answer'.

band9.text: Back in my primary school days, I was absolutely enamored with Music. I found the process of learning different instruments and understanding melodies to be incredibly rewarding. It came naturally to me, and it provided a wonderful creative outlet amidst the more academic subjects.
band9.note: Diễn đạt cực kỳ lôi cuốn ('enamored with', 'incredibly rewarding', 'came naturally', 'creative outlet', 'amidst'). Sử dụng cấu trúc câu linh hoạt.

v.meaning: sự yêu thích/yếu lòng đối với
v.example: I've always had a soft spot for stray animals.
The idea of traveling around the world really appealed to me.

v.meaning: đến tự nhiên/dễ dàng đối với tôi
v.example: Public speaking has always come naturally to her.
He became completely enamored with the local culture.

v.meaning: nơi để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
v.example: Writing poetry is a great creative outlet for many people.

v.meaning: giữa/trong khi (đang xảy ra cái gì đó)
v.example: He managed to stay calm amidst all the chaos.
I still remember my best friend from my primary school days.
Mathematics is considered a core subject in the national curriculum.
She won an award for her outstanding work in Art class.
We learned to play the recorder in our Music lessons.
PE is a great way for students to stay active during the school day.
In Science class, we learned about the different parts of a flower.
Social Studies helps children understand their place in the community.
It's important for children to have a strong foundation in their mother tongue.
Primary school is where children learn fundamental skills like reading and writing.
The course provides a solid foundation for further studies in physics.
She is an elementary school teacher in a small town.
The school aims to nurture the unique talents of every child.
The city has a very diverse and multi-cultural population.
The teacher used engaging games to help the children learn math.
His story of survival is truly inspiring.
The school play was a very memorable event for everyone involved.
Helping children to read is a very rewarding experience.
Learning to play a musical instrument is a challenging but fun experience.
The kittens were having a playful fight in the garden.
Children's natural curiosity leads them to explore their surroundings.
Reading helps children develop their imagination.
Space exploration has led to many technological breakthroughs.
The discovery of gravity changed our understanding of the universe.
We were taught the basic principles of healthy eating.
Critical thinking and problem-solving are essential skills for the future.
The two companies are in collaboration on a new project.
School is a great place for children to develop their social skills.
I've made many lasting friendships through my work.
I used to participate in many school activities, like the debating club.
We went on several field trips to the science museum.
The principal gave a speech during the weekly school assembly.
A positive classroom environment is conducive to learning.
The school provides all the necessary learning materials for the students.
Art and music allow children for creative expression.
The extracurricular programs are aimed at the holistic development of students.
The school is committed to maintaining high educational standards.
The new pedagogical approach focuses on student-centered learning.
Early literacy skills provide a strong academic foundation for children.
Puzzles and games can help improve a child's cognitive ability.

v.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ
v.example: We aim to foster intellectual curiosity and a love of learning.
The university values applicants who have a well-rounded academic background.

v.meaning: sự xuất sắc trong học tập
v.example: The school rewards students for their academic excellence and hard work.
Education should instill a commitment to lifelong learning.
Her passion for teaching is an inspiration to all her colleagues.
